title: To A Simple Housewife
content:
Who dough shall knead as for God's sake
        Shall fill it with celestial leaven,
    And every loaf that she shall bake
        Be eaten of the Blest in heaven.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Richard Le Gallienne, titled "To A Simple Housewife", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
